message:
feat: integrate vsock snapshot service into daemon

- Add SnapshotService that handles snapshot requests from VMs
- Add ListTaskSnapshots method for querying task snapshots
- VM ID to task ID resolution (with TODO for CID mapping)
- Snapshot service starts automatically with daemon

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,11 +17,12 @@ import (
 
 // Daemon is the core daemon process that manages workspaces and tasks.
 type Daemon struct {
-	cfg      *config.Config
-	secrets  secrets.Provider
-	zfs      *zfs.Manager
-	state    *State
-	tasks    *TaskManager
+	cfg       *config.Config
+	secrets   secrets.Provider
+	zfs       *zfs.Manager
+	state     *State
+	tasks     *TaskManager
+	snapshots *SnapshotService
 
 	listener   net.Listener
 	grpcServer *grpc.Server
@@ -86,6 +87,14 @@ func (d *Daemon) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
 
 	fmt.Printf("gRPC server started on %s\n", d.cfg.Daemon.SocketPath)
 
+	// Start snapshot service
+	d.snapshots = NewSnapshotService(d)
+	go func() {
+		if err := d.snapshots.Start(ctx); err != nil {
+			fmt.Printf("Snapshot service error: %v\n", err)
+		}
+	}()
+
 	<-ctx.Done()
 	return d.Stop()
 }
